_comment: Role-default context paths keyed on cohort (ADR-M013-A). Used by context-inject.sh static path. Each entry is an array of {tier, path, rationale} objects. Paths are relative to the project root (or .aihaus/ base). The token '<story-file>' is resolved at runtime by context-inject.sh.

:planner-binding.rationale: ADRs gate all architectural decisions and are binding on planners.
Known gotchas and patterns prevent repeated mistakes in planning.
Stack, conventions, and milestone history inform planning scope.
Analyst brief is the primary input to binding-tier planners.

:planner.rationale: ADRs are binding; planners must not contradict existing architecture.
Known gotchas and reusable patterns are relevant to research synthesis.
Stack and conventions provide grounding for research and analysis.
Prior analysis brief gives context on what has already been investigated.

:doer.rationale: ADRs are binding on implementation; must not contradict architecture.
Stack, conventions, and verification commands required for implementation.
Story spec and acceptance criteria define the implementation target.

:verifier.rationale: ADRs define what must be verified as implemented correctly.
Known gotchas surface verification gaps agents self-report miss.
Acceptance criteria are the ground truth for verification verdicts.
Execution artifacts and prior summaries provide evidence for verification.

:adversarial-scout.rationale: ADRs are the binding contract scouts verify plans comply with.
Known gotchas are primary adversarial scout targets.
Story spec is the scope boundary for adversarial plan review.

:adversarial-review.rationale: ADRs are the contract reviewers verify the diff complies with.
Known gotchas are the primary adversarial review targets.
Prior review findings inform adversarial review patterns.
